roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/TN:DONAVEN PATRICK STJOHN/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED,/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER: ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THESENTENCE IN COURT NO, 20003768,/X:AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASEPURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/VD:PRELIM HRG OF 05-06-20/
/CAL:RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X:PURSUANT TO THE BAILIFF, DEFENDANT IS TOO ILL TO ATTEND COURT TODAY,/NP/LD:06-02-20 (60TH)/CONTD:RETURNON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ON 04-14-20/DOPC/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/RX/DTC/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/LDPX: 06-02-20/987,2/ACM/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
